commission_note: Included in the per-player price. Paid on deposit collection for every confirmed traveller.

options.tagline: College-level tour. Strong opposition, deep culture.
highlights: Games against strong local Spanish opposition
Training sessions in Madrid, Valencia and Barcelona
Deep cultural programme: Madrid, Valencia old town, Barcelona Gothic Quarter
Built for a college roster: 30 travellers, tight 8-night window
Commission of $200/player already baked into price

itinerary.title: Arrival in Madrid
itinerary.detail: Airport pickup by Raul Sanz. Transfer to Madrid accommodation. Welcome briefing and dinner.

itinerary.title: Madrid training + city
itinerary.detail: Morning training vs local college-level opposition. Afternoon panoramic tour of Madrid, Gran Vía, Plaza Mayor. Optional La Liga match.

itinerary.title: First fixture in Madrid
itinerary.detail: Match against a Spanish college or semi-pro side. Filmed and tagged per player.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Valencia
itinerary.detail: Coastal route. Check-in in Valencia. Evening walk through Valencia old town with guide.

itinerary.title: Valencia training + fixture
itinerary.detail: Morning session. Afternoon cultural programme at Ciudad de las Artes y las Ciencias. Evening match vs Valencia college side.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Barcelona
itinerary.detail: Check-in Castelldefels. Afternoon full day in Barcelona. Gothic Quarter, La Rambla, tapas dinner.

itinerary.title: Barcelona fixture
itinerary.detail: Competitive friendly against Spanish college opposition. Post-match recovery + team meal.

itinerary.title: Culture + final fixture
itinerary.detail: Morning cultural programme in Barcelona. Evening closing fixture. Team awards.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.detail: Breakfast + airport transfers from Barcelona.

included: All meals (breakfast + dinner daily, select lunches)
Bilingual Odisea guide with group end-to-end
All training sessions and fixtures arranged with Spanish clubs
excluded: Lunches marked 'at own cost' in itinerary

options.tagline: Same package we ran for Hawaii Elite. Families welcome, all age groups.
options.price_note: Final per-player price matches Hawaii Elite 2026 package and is confirmed once we lock dates and final headcount.
highlights: Training at Spanish FA headquarters (RFEF, Las Rozas)
Full training sessions at Valencia CF facilities with official staff
Training at FC Barcelona with official FC Barcelona coaches
Games against strong local Spanish opposition in every city
Families travel on the same itinerary (all age groups welcome, boys + girls)
Beach + culture days built in: Peñiscola, Sitges, Valencia, Barcelona
Stadium tours: Santiago Bernabéu, Mestalla, Camp Nou / La Masia
Optional La Liga match and FC Barcelona women's La Liga match
Commission of $200/player already baked into price

itinerary.title: Arrival in Madrid
itinerary.detail: Raul Sanz airport welcome. Check in at Spanish FA headquarters. Afternoon free in Madrid city centre. Evening HESA training at Spanish FA + welcome meeting.

itinerary.title: RFEF training + Madrid
itinerary.detail: Two full sessions at Spanish FA. Lunch on-site. Afternoon Madrid sightseeing. Optional La Liga match in the evening.

itinerary.title: Bernabéu + transfer to Valencia
itinerary.detail: Real Madrid CF Santiago Bernabéu stadium tour. Madrid panoramic tour. Afternoon transfer to Valencia. Check in 4-star hotel.

itinerary.title: Mestalla + first fixture
itinerary.detail: Valencia CF Mestalla stadium tour. Free time Valencia old town. Evening match vs local Spanish opposition.

itinerary.title: Valencia CF training day
itinerary.detail: Full morning + full afternoon training sessions at Valencia CF with official Valencia CF staff. Certificates ceremony. Transfer to Benicassim coastal hotel.

itinerary.title: Beach + second fixture
itinerary.detail: Free morning. Evening pre-game meeting + match vs Club Fomento (or equivalent Spanish side).

itinerary.title: Peñiscola + free time
itinerary.detail: Day trip to Peñiscola castle. Free afternoon and evening in Benicassim.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Barcelona + FCB training
itinerary.detail: Morning transfer to Barcelona (Castelldefels hotel). Afternoon FC Barcelona training session at Joan Gamper (players). Families visit FC Barcelona museum + shop.

itinerary.title: FC Barcelona youth + La Liga
itinerary.detail: Morning at FC Barcelona training ground, watch FC Barcelona youth games. Full day Barcelona. Evening FC Barcelona women's La Liga match (Johan Cruyff stadium).

itinerary.title: Beach + Sitges
itinerary.detail: Free beach day in Castelldefels. Optional afternoon trip to Sitges.

itinerary.title: FCB training + closing fixture
itinerary.detail: Morning FC Barcelona training with official FC Barcelona coaches. Afternoon full Barcelona. Evening closing match vs FC Barcelona youth (TBC).

itinerary.title: Departures from Barcelona
itinerary.detail: Breakfast. Airport transfers arranged for all passengers.

included: All accommodation (Spanish FA HQ, 4-star Valencia, Benicassim coastal, Castelldefels)
Training sessions at Spanish FA, Valencia CF and FC Barcelona
Games against local Spanish opposition in every city
Stadium tours: Santiago Bernabéu, Mestalla, Camp Nou / La Masia
excluded: Lunches marked 'at own cost' in itinerary
